title: Move images 50% faster in 2026 with Starlink CDN
meta_description: Cut image upload time 60% with Starlink CDN — Lambda@Edge, sharp 0.33.2, and the resize mistakes most teams make.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams still ship images from London to Nairobi at 280 ms latency.

Starlink cut that to 110 ms, but the real problem is 50 concurrent 10 MB uploads.

https://kubaik.github.io/move-images-50-faster-in-2026-with-starlink-cdn
